textByHashes.e4ca5dca56802f3a699196c4bd2a027eba83a553: Don't expect me to deal with the likes of you.
textByHashes.f77b0f2fb97dc76011a198dbc2d914dba96efe6a: If you're planning on fighting me for a set of my armour, I'm afraid I'm not interested. The combat XP from fighting you isn't worthwhile. Get a Defence level of 20 first.
textByHashes.3de448953e2e2790ff2a81cee8999c40b8e93de9: If you're hoping to fight me for a piece of my armour, you've got to own a full set of the tier 2 armour first. Try fighting my subordinate.
textByHashes.1aaed217fbc16dcd90785a17419971b3e529db07: Fancy a fight? The combat practice would be good for me. I'll give you a piece of my armour if you win.
textByHashes.c5ad8be0002e32849fba8e8f1368b27c8ade7f77: I'll be here if you ever change your mind. I love a good fight.
textByHashes.ce88740e162da3ae0f2f9d37c0178902b530d310: Fancy another fight? The combat practice is good for me. I'll give you some more of my armour if you win.
textByHashes.f5a1ef77798da9c2b004b01109a7f9b1dec366b7: Don't you already have a set of my armour?
textByHashes.d2422af6e13b78707154da9e66cf97106371e1ff: I'll be here if you ever change your mind.
